name: Jicama Relish
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb Jicama, Peeled and Finely Chopped
1/4 cup Frozen Whole Corn, Thawed and Drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a small mixing bowl.
2. Mix well.
3. Cover and let stand several hours at room temperature.
4. Serve chilled. Refrigerate any remaining relish.
